introSection: Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning roller coaster at Illinois State Fair in Springfield, Illinois.

sections.title: History
sections.content: When Crazy Mouse opened in 2018, it was the first coaster to come to the Illinois State Fair.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning roller coaster at Illinois State Fair in Springfield, Illinois.

When Crazy Mouse opened in 2018, it was the first coaster to come to the Illinois State Fair.
